user.title: Connect Wadaco Nước Sạch account
user.description: Pick your managing branch code and enter the customer code and password for your account on the Wadaco customer-care portal (cskh.wadaco.com.vn).

data_description.org_code: The branch code managing your account (default Wadaco - CN0181). Pick another value from the list, or type your own if your branch isn't listed.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch new data from Wadaco (1-48 hours). Default is 12 hours since the water meter is hand-read only once a month (around the 4th-6th).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Wadaco server. Please try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid branch code, customer code or password.

abort.already_configured: This customer code is already configured.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch new data from Wadaco (1-48 hours).
